---
title: "Collaborator Analysis"
format: html
author: "Andie Norton"
---

## Exercise: Explore, Clean, and Wrangle Data

#### Load necessary documents
```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(here)
```

#### bring in the data!
```{r}
lobster_traps <- read_csv("../data/Lobster_Trap_Counts_All_Years_20210519.csv")
```
